en: Dude, I got that.
ko: 야 그걸 받았어 1992년 여름 목요일 밤에 Dazed and Confused 촬영장에 걸어갔지

en: I walked on the set of Days Confused on Thursday night in the summer of 1992, and there were
ko: 야 그걸 받았어 1992년 여름 목요일 밤에 Dazed and Confused 촬영장에 걸어갔지

en: three lines written in that script for my character.
ko: 내 캐릭터 대사가 세 줄 적혀 있었어

en: And I wasn't supposed to work that night, I was just doing a hair and makeup test, and
ko: 그날 밤 촬영할 예정이 아니었어 헤어 메이크업 테스트만 하러 간 건데 Richard Linklater가 와서 둘러보더니 좋아 이게 Wooderson이야 합격이라고 했어

en: Richard Linklater comes up and circles me and was like, yeah, right on, cool, all right,
this is Wooderson, yeah, you got it, and I go, all right, man, he approves, and I go
ko: 좋아 멋지다 이게 Wooderson이야 합격이라고 해서 알겠어 형이라고 했지 승인하고 작별 인사하려는데 잠깐만 하더라

en: to say goodbye, and he goes, hey, hang on a minute, I got this, you know, this girl
ko: 나한테 Marissa Rabesey라는 여자가 빨간 머리 지적인 역을 맡고 차에 좀 너드 같은 친구들이 있는데 Wooderson이 그녀를 데리러 갈 것 같냐고 했어

en: Marissa Rabesey's playing the redheaded intellectual over here, and she's got her kind of nerdy
ko: 응 Wooderson은 모든 타입의 여자를 좋아하지 했더니 다음 순간 차에 타서 촬영에 들어갔어

en: friends in the car, you think Wooderson would maybe go pick her up?
I'm like, yeah, man, Wooderson likes all kinds of chicks. Boom.
ko: 그 씬 시작에서 세 마디를 했는데 내 캐릭터가 가진 것에 대한 세 가지 긍정이었어

en: Next thing you know, I'm in the car getting a lob there, Mike, we go up.
ko: 차가 있고 로큰롤이 있고 대마초가 있었고

en: Opening of that scene, I say those three words, and they were three affirmations of what my
ko: Slater 그리고 네 번째로 좋아하는 걸 얻으러 가는 거였어 빨간 머리 지적인 여자를 데리러

en: character did have.
He had his car, he had rock and roll, and he had a doobie, the Slater, and he was going
ko: 머릿속으로 4개 중 3개를 가졌으니 4번째를 얻으러 가자 all right all right all right 카메라 앞에서 한 첫 세 마디야

en: to get the fourth thing that he liked, which was going to pick up the redheaded intellectual,
ko: 카메라에 잡히지도 않았어 위에서 찍은 와이드샷이었거든 내가 한 첫 세 마디인데

en: so in my mind, I was like, oh, I got three out of four, going to get the fourth, all right, all right, all right.
ko: Adam 그게 오스틴에서 일주일간 한 작은 취미가 될지 다시는 안 할지 몰랐는데 결국 커리어가 됐어 그리고 그게 내 첫 세 마디야

en: First three words I ever said on camera, and if you see the film, it's not even on camera, it's a wide shot above.
First three words I ever said, and look, Adam, I didn't know if that was going to be this
ko: 그걸 즐기지 못할 만큼 거만하지 않아 대단해 그런 관점 좋아 질리지 않아 응

en: little hobby one-off thing I did one summer for a week in Austin and never did it again,
and it turned out to be a career. And that's the first three words I said, and they precede me to this day.
I ain't arrogant enough to not enjoy that. That's awesome.
I love your perspective on that. Never gets old. Nah.
